The wo_skills plan is surprisingly strong for a baseline agent — it correctly applies nearly all the same principles — but the protein variety gap and slightly less explicit structural organization give wi_skills a modest quality advantage. Final verdict: wi_skills is more effective, primarily due to superior protein variety and more structured plan documentation.
